verdict_reason: Local-dev compose additions are correct and consistent with servicebus-config.json and application config; only two minor robustness nits (unpinned emulator :latest tag, no emulator healthcheck behind service_started).

todos.issue: servicebus-emulator uses the unpinned :latest tag while the sibling localstack service is pinned to 3.0.2 — an upstream emulator release can silently break every developer's local stack
todos.fix: Pin the image to a specific version tag (e.g. mcr.microsoft.com/azure-messaging/servicebus-emulator:1.1.2), matching the pinned-localstack pattern in this file

todos.issue: Gateway depends_on servicebus-emulator with condition: service_started and the emulator has no healthcheck, so the app can start before the emulator accepts AMQP connections (mssql gets service_healthy; the emulator does not)
todos.fix: Add a healthcheck to servicebus-emulator (e.g. TCP probe on 5672 or the emulator's documented readiness check) and change the gateway dependency to condition: service_healthy
